content: Murphy: Gods, this fucking ruin reeks of Falmer filth and dried cum. Keep your crossbow ready—those blind fuckers love ambushing from the shadows, then raping what’s left of their prey. Freya: Saw one of those pale bastards mounted on a Chaurus last week. Fucking disgusting, but at least they don’t last long once I put a bolt through their slit. You ever get cornered by ‘em? Murphy: Almost. Strangled one with its own guts before it could shove its cock in me. Nasty shits don’t even wipe. You hear the Jarl’s decree? More patrols near Kynesgrove—turns out Draugr and bandits are teaming up to raid travelers, then gang-fuck ‘em on the roadside. Freya: Typical. Bet the Draugr don’t even bother looting, just pound holes and leave corpses stiff in more ways than one. Dibella’s tits, this province’s gone to hell. Murphy: Ain’t all bad. Plenty of work for women who know how to handle a weapon—or a cock. You still running with that Riekling tribe up north? Freya: Fuck no. Little blue shits couldn’t keep up.
